buyer_id.description: Reference to the Buyer record this rule belongs to

vertical.description: Optional vertical code the rule applies to

campaign_id.description: Optional reference to a Campaign record the rule applies to

conditions.description: JSON array of {field, operator, value} conditions using the exact same shape and operators as LeadByteConnector field conditions, so the Buyers CPL editor can reuse the existing field condition builder component

cpl.description: The price paid when the conditions match

priority.description: Evaluation order when multiple rules match, higher priority wins
